title: 10 Releasing AFT Transactions on PaymentStream AFT
body_text:
10	Releasing AFT Transactions on PaymentStream AFT
10.1	Overview of Releasing AFT Transactions on PaymentStream AFT
Originators that enter payor/payee records on
PaymentStream芒聞垄
AFT, determine during enrollment whether the AFT transactions will be released manually or automatically. If the Originator is a business member, you determine if the business member or your financial institution will enter the AFT transactions on
PaymentStream
AFT.
10.2	Manual Release of AFT Transactions on PaymentStream AFT
The Originator is responsible for releasing AFT transactions on the appropriate dates. All AFT transactions selected for manual release must be confirmed by the user before the transactions are released for processing. After the transactions are successfully validated, confirmation is emailed to the addresses specified by the Originator during enrollment.
When AFT transactions are successfully validated, the transactions are sent to the receiving financial institutions. The due dates for all applicable payor/payee records are updated based on a record芒聙聶s frequency. The validated transactions are listed in the Release History Report.
To view file delivery deadlines for manual release, see the Introduction to AFT Part. To view procedures for releasing AFT files manually, see the
PaymentStream
AFT 芒聙聯 Guide for Manual Release, Form 5599.
Related Information
PaymentStream
AFT 芒聙聯 Guide for Manual Release,
Form 5599
10.3	Automatic Release of AFT Transactions on PaymentStream AFT
Central 1 confirms file validation of automatically released files via email. The email is sent to the addresses specified by the Originator during enrollment.
If an automatically released file is successfully validated, the transactions are sent to the receiving financial institutions. The due dates for all applicable payor/payee records are updated based on a record芒聙聶s frequency. The validated transactions are listed in the Release History Report.
If a released AFT file isn芒聙聶t successfully validated, an email is sent to the addresses specified by the Originator during enrollment. The Originator must check the Activity Log Report to identify the error and make the necessary corrections. For procedures on how to access reports, see the
PaymentStream
AFT 芒聙聯 Guide for Automatic Release, Form 5598.
To view automatic release times, see the Introduction to AFT Part.
Related Information
PaymentStream
AFT 芒聙聯 Guide for Automatic Release,
Form 5598
END
